scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build -w @verbb/plugin-kit-playground --if-present && npm run docs:build --if-present
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @verbb/plugin-kit-core && npm run build -w @verbb/plugin-kit-icons && npm run build -w @verbb/plugin-kit-codemirror-core && npm run build -w @verbb/plugin-kit-tiptap-core && npm run build -w @verbb/plugin-kit-forms && npm run build:web && npm run build -w @verbb/plugin-kit-react && npm run build -w @verbb/plugin-kit-vue
scripts.build:web: rm -rf plugin-kit-web/dist plugin-kit-web/dist-loader && npm run build -w @verbb/plugin-kit-web
